events.summary: Cheyenne Haslett (@cheyennehaslett): Latest on today's efforts between Anthropic and the Trump admin to lift the export controls: first day of in-person meetings after Anthropic sent top safety and policy people to DC; Commerce and ONCD staff-led technical meetings including Chris Fall at CAISI; a senior White House official said resolution will likely take longer than a few days, though it could move quickly.

data.author_description: White House reporter at POLITICO covering health and tech; previously ABC.

events.summary: Hadas Gold (@Hadas_Gold): Anthropic at the meetings in DC today: senior technical Anthropic staff met with administration officials after prior virtual meetings, and both parties are working quickly toward protecting US critical infrastructure and the US lead in cyber defense.

data.author_description: CNN correspondent in New York covering AI; previously reported from Jerusalem, London, and DC.
